rules.rule_text:
rule DarkCrystal
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "DarkCrystal system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "Monitors:" ascii
		$x2 = "Save Time:" ascii
		$x3 = "LANIP:" ascii
		$x4 = ".NET Framework Version:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
